message:
🐛 Replace EventSource with fetch-based SSE to keep JWT out of URLs (#2449)

Replaces EventSource (which requires token in URL query params) with
fetch() + ReadableStream that sends JWT via Authorization header.
This keeps tokens out of server logs, browser history, and proxy logs.

The backend auth middleware already supports Authorization header —
the _token query param fallback remains for backward compatibility.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
